productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Girls Printed Navy Blue Dress
description: Style Note Make your own casual fashion rules with this navy blue and white polka dotted dress from United Colours of Benetton. The pretty girl look is cute, while the cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with leggings and comfy sandals. Product Details Navy blue and white sleeveless polka dotted dress, has a round neck with a frill around the neckline, an elasticated midriff with gathers below it and lace above the hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations
